title: Property Definition
description: Schema for defining a property within a governed memory collection.

id.description: Unique property identifier. Auto-generated if not provided.

name.description: Human-readable property name displayed in UIs and extraction results.

systemName.description: Machine-readable identifier. Lowercase, underscored. Used for programmatic lookup.

type.description: Data type for the extracted value.

description.description: Detailed description guiding the extraction model. Include scope, examples, boundaries, and edge cases. This is the most important field for extraction quality.

extractionHints.description: Additional guidance for the extraction model. Supplements the description with content-specific tips.

options.description: Allowed values when type is 'options'. The extraction model will only return values from this list.

tags.description: Tags for property selection boosting. Properties with tags matching the content context receive higher relevance scores.

updateSemantics.description: 'replace': new values overwrite existing. 'append': values accumulate over time (e.g., 'pain points mentioned').
